Ascents of Mount Rainier - Most Recent Year

This page shows all the ascents and attempts of Mount Rainier that have been entered by registered climbers on this site. This list only shows climbs by Peakbagger.com users, and is not a comprehensive list of everyone who has summited this peak. Note: Click on an individual linked "Date" value for a full trip report. Ascents marked with a "TR" have a written trip report with the indicated number of words.

New!  Peak GPS Map - 10 most recent tracks (or different routes), all on one map. Helpful for peaks that have more that one popular route.
